CIML Meeting1984October 1, 1984

🇫🇮 Helsinki, Finland

20th CIML Meeting — Minutes (EN, Bulletin)

Meeting DOI10.63493/meetings/ciml20
Meeting URNurn:oiml:ciml:meeting:ciml-20

Agenda

ItemTitleOutcome
1APPROVAL OF THE REPORT ON THE 19th COMMITTEE MEETINGAdopted
2APPROVAL OF THE ACCOUNTANT REPORT FOR 1983 AND OTHER FINANCIAL INFORMATIONAdopted
3EXAMINATION OF THE DETAILED DRAFT REGULATIONS FOR THE OIML RETIREMENT PLANDiscussed
4EXAMINATION OF PROPOSALS OF THE PRESIDENTIAL COUNCIL CONCERNING LONG-TERM PLANNING OF OIML WORK, AND THE ROLE AND RESPONSIBILITIES OF CIML MEMBERSDiscussed
5SEVENTH CONFERENCE : ORGANIZATION OF THE MEETING, CHAIRMANSHIP, AGENDADiscussed
6IMPLEMENTATION OF THE DECISIONS OF THE CONFERENCEDiscussed
7EXAMINATION OF THE SITUATION OF SOME SECRETARIATSDiscussed
7.1SP5 (volumes of liquids)Discussed
7.2SP13 (electricity)Discussed
7.3Photometry and radiometryDiscussed
7.4SP 17-Sr 3 (radioactive pollution)Discussed
7.5SP 2-Sr 4 (recognition of metrological controls)Discussed
7.6Suppression of certain SecretariatsDiscussed
7.7SP 2-Sr 6 and SP 7-Sr 2Discussed
7.8Recalibration intervals of measurement standards and standard devicesDiscussed
8REPORT ON ACTIVITY OF BIMLDiscussed
9OTHER QUESTIONSDiscussed
9.1Collaboration ARSO-OIMLDiscussed
10DATE AND PLACE OF THE NEXT CIML MEETINGDiscussed

OIML

International Organization of Legal Metrology

Legal metrology — the practice and science of measurement that affects trade, health, safety, and the environment.
